summary: Completed comprehensive testing of updated reseller page with Uniplay-style features. All major functionality working correctly including hero section with social proof stats, interactive profit calculator, pricing packages with billing toggle, testimonials section, and mobile responsiveness.

ui_bugs.issue: Register button navigation may not be working properly from reseller page

passed_tests: Hero section loads with proper title and social proof stats (Total Omzet, Total Transaksi, Reseller Aktif, Rating)
Benefits section displays all 6 benefit cards correctly
Profit calculator sliders are interactive - selling price and daily sales sliders work
Profit calculations update dynamically when sliders are moved
Pricing packages section shows all 3 tiers (Pro, Legend, Supreme)
Popular badge displays on Legend package
Testimonials section shows 3 success stories with star ratings and profit info
Wall of Fame section displays properly
FAQ section is present and accessible
Mobile responsiveness works well - layout adapts properly to mobile viewport
Navigation buttons (CTA buttons) work for scrolling to sections
Registration form displays appropriate content for non-logged in users
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor fix needed: Verify register button navigation from reseller page works properly. All other functionality is working correctly.
